title: Lightweight RPG
description: This Modpack is a collection of lightweight mods to make standard vanilla a little more exciting without changing the whole game
body:
## Lightweight RPG This Modpack is a collection of lightweight Mods to improve the basic Vanilla Minecraft experience with RPG features like Stats, Equipment, Structures without changing the whole game. Mods that actually implement new Items are: - [Cammie's Wearable Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/cammies-wearable-backpacks) - [Icarus](https://modrinth.com/mod/icarus) - [Gearifiers](https://modrinth.com/mod/gearifiers) - [Immersive Armors](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-armors) - [Mimic](https://modrinth.com/mod/mimic) - [Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) - [Terrestria](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrestria) - [Woods and Mires](https://modrinth.com/mod/woods-and-mires) - [Promenade](https://modrinth.com/mod/promenade) - [The Graveyard](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-graveyard-fabric) The Rest are QoL Mods to tune the Ambient of Vanilla Minecraft to a bit more Adventure and some Performance Mods to keep the FPS Counter steady above 60 even on older Mashines If you have any Idea which mods would fit perfectly, hit me up on my [Discord](https://discord.gg/V9XcJSSdwB) ## Currently unsupported Versions
1.18.2

Mods with no 1.18.2 version: - [Gearifiers](https://modrinth.com/mod/gearifiers) - [Mimic](https://modrinth.com/mod/mimic) - [Immersive Structures](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-structures) - [More Mob Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-mob-variants) - [Goodall](https://modrinth.com/mod/goodall) - [Icarus](https://modrinth.com/mod/icarus)

1.19.3

No reason to create an extra version of it as it is now, since a lot of actual code got rewritten in Minecrafts API and the differences to 1.19.2 are non existing
